# boot-trace

Dependency-light, web-only leaf library that owns the module-level boot-span
store. Imported eagerly by the framework boot path so it is live before any
resource mounts: framework instrumentation points open/close spans
(`startBootSpan` / `markBootInstant` / `recordBootSpan`) and a consumer reads the
assembled timeline via `getBootTrace()`, which also folds in Navigation/Paint
Timing and the first React commit. Everything shares one clock
(`performance.now()` on `performance.timeOrigin`).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Module-level boot-span store imported eagerly by the framework boot path. Captures one-clock boot spans (startBootSpan/markBootInstant/recordBootSpan) and folds in Navigation/Paint Timing plus the first React commit; getBootTrace() assembles the trace.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `debug/boot-profile`, `framework/web-core`, `infra/boot-snapshot`
- Web:
  - Exports: Types: `BootPhase`, `BootSpan`, `BootTrace`, `NavTiming`; Values: `getBootTrace`, `markBootInstant`, `recordBootSpan`, `startBootSpan`, `subscribeBootTrace`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
